rationale: Educ. Code §13.010 governs school district boundary descriptions and maps filed with TEA. It has no operative relationship to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 13.010. BOUNDARY DESCRIPTIONS AND MAPS TO BE FILED WITH AGENCY.
_note: No conflict; rule is procedural regarding district boundaries, unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
